assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, with specific recommendations to test on Rapid dev clusters before prod upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response mentions Autopilot manages node pools, includes Autopilot-specific sections about resource requests and node management limitations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl api-resources' command to inventory current API versions and mentions checking deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking resource requests that might conflict with Autopilot minimums and validating resource requests are honored

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: While the checklist is comprehensive, it does not specifically mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs), bare pods, or graceful shutdown configuration

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Response includes 'gcloud container clusters describe [CLUSTER-NAME]' command for cluster status verification

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive application health checks, pod status verification, endpoint testing, and monitoring validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends ensuring Rapid channel dev clusters are on 1.32 and running full test suites before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeline for planning purposes
Response includes extensive monitoring and observability validation items including dashboards, metrics collection, log aggregation, and alerting

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response correctly does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, staying focused on Autopilot's managed nature
